title: Spryzeen's Knight Armor Chestplate Fix
description: Fixes the inconsistency between the iron and copper chestplate item and model to have proper pauldrons.
body:
Have you ever used Spryzeen's Knight Armor and noticed that something was off about the iron/copper chestplate and that it doesn't match the other ones nor the inventory item?

Did you ever want for that to change?

Well, I did. So i whipped up this little resource pack that works even in 1.20.1, with the v1.8 version of the original resource pack that you can exclusively find on [curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/spryzeens-knight-armor/files/5538459)! ...for some reason...

So I present to you: 
## Spryzeen's Knight Armor Chestplate Fix
(what a gamechanger ikr)
![Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41f663d4e89485180f223fd4223bee1b6a573924_0.webp)

I MIGHT just have ocd
